_comment: TEMPLATE FILE — copy this to a new file WITHOUT the leading underscore (e.g. my-recipe.json) and fill it in. Files starting with '_' are ignored by the app on purpose, so this template never shows up on the site.
title: Recipe Title
description: A short, appetising one or two sentence description shown on the card and at the top of the recipe page.
_categoryOptions: one of: breakfast, starter, main, side, dessert, snack, drink — see src/data/categories.json
_sortKeyHelp: REQUIRED. The word/phrase this recipe alphabetizes under on the homepage, e.g. for 'Classic Ratatouille' set sortKey to 'Ratatouille' so it sorts under R instead of C. Always set this explicitly — npm run check-recipes will flag it if it's missing.
steps: First step, written as a full sentence.
footnote: Optional tip, variation, or storage advice. Remove this field entirely if not needed.
